# `timeframe`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

## Signature

```ts
timeframe: TimeframeView = Object.freeze({
    period: "",
    isintraday: false,
    isdaily: false,
    isweekly: false,
    ismonthly: false,
    inSeconds: Number.NaN,
})
```
